title: agropyron trachycaulum var. unilaterale
intro: Agropyron trachycaulum var. unilaterale, also known as Green Needle Grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the wheat grass family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Green Needle Grass include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Green Needle Grass is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
